title: Registration for Name Hire Workers
content:
A worker may register as a name hire at the One Stop Landbased Accreditation and Processing Center, located at the 2nd floor, POEA Bldg, Ortigas corner EDSA, Mandaluyong City or at any of the following POEA regional centers and regional extension units:

1. POEA Regional Center for Luzon, 3rd Floor, Tabora Bldg. III P. Burgos St San Fernando City, La Union
2. POEA Regional Center for Visayas, 3rd Floor, Gemini Building 719 M. J. Cuenco Ave., Cebu City
3. POEA Regional Center for Mindanao, Door 1 & 2, Seo Leng Wong Bldg. Jacinto-Artiaga St., Davao City
4. POEA Regional Extension Unit - CAR, Benitez Court Compound Magsaysay Ave., Baguio City
5. POEA Regional Extension Unit - Region VI, 2nd Floor, S.C. Divinagracia Bldg. Quezon Street, Iloilo City

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
